title: Mari s seyiuu confirmed
wikitext:
[]: Mari ******* ***'s seyiuu confirmed! Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Apr 01, 2009 2:16 am You first heard it here folks, Mari's seiyuu has been confirmed! The mysterious Glasses Girl wearing pilot of Eva-05 will be voiced by none other than everyone's favorite seiyuu, Norio Wakamoto! When asked how he felt about the role, the great veteran seiyuu replied he hoped for " Vegeta to become the legend " and promised much " Very melon " for all.

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed Apr 01, 2009 2:17 am Apriru Fooruru! ...or however they'd say it.

[]: Post by Tsachoul » Wed Apr 01, 2009 2:28 am Finally, some decent talent in this movie.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Apr 01, 2009 2:33 am "IT'S A TRAP!"

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Apr 01, 2009 8:52 am Worst April Fools Ever.

[]: Post by BrikHaus » Wed Apr 01, 2009 9:04 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Worst April Fools Ever.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Apr 01, 2009 11:24 am "EVA" IS TEH WORST ANIMU EVER U PEOPLE SHOULD BE ASHAMED OF YOURSELVES!1!!!11 LOOK AT HOW SERIOUS I AM!

[]: Post by NAveryW » Wed Apr 01, 2009 12:49 pm This is obviously spam. I'm using my new mod powers to lock this thread.
